theoremName: Hermite-Biehler/de Branges endpoint passage for shifted Xi

shiftedKernelPositivityStatus.label: shifted-Xi de Branges kernel positivity for all 0<omega<1/2
shiftedKernelPositivityStatus.reason: Imported from the shifted-Xi de Branges kernel positivity theorem.  For every 0<omega<1/2, the kernel K_{E_omega} is positive on finite evaluation sets in the upper half-plane.

diagonalInequalityStatus.label: diagonal de Branges inequality
diagonalInequalityStatus.reason: For z in C_+, K_E(z,z)>=0 and 2*pi*i*(conj(z)-z)=4*pi*Im(z)>0 give |Xi(z-i omega)|<=|Xi(z+i omega)|.

zeroDescentContradictionStatus.label: zero-descent contradiction
zeroDescentContradictionStatus.reason: If Xi(rho)=0 with Im(rho)=b>0, then for every 0<omega<min(b,1/2), z=rho-i omega lies in C_+ and the diagonal inequality forces Xi(rho-2i omega)=0.  This gives a continuum of zeros accumulating at rho, contradicting that Xi is a nonzero entire function.

lowerHalfPlaneExclusionStatus.label: lower-half-plane exclusion
lowerHalfPlaneExclusionStatus.reason: Xi is real entire in the z-normalization, so Xi(conj z)=conj Xi(z).  Any lower-half-plane zero would conjugate to an upper-half-plane zero, already excluded.

rhSideZeroLocationStatus.label: RH-side zero-location conclusion in z-normalization
rhSideZeroLocationStatus.reason: All zeros of Xi(z)=xi(1/2+i z) are real.  This is equivalent to the nontrivial zeros of xi(s) lying on Re(s)=1/2.

proof: Kernel positivity gives K_{E_omega}(z,z)>=0 for every z in C_+ and every 0<omega<1/2.
Since K_{E_omega}(z,z)=(|Xi(z+i omega)|^2-|Xi(z-i omega)|^2)/(4*pi*Im z), we have |Xi(z-i omega)|<=|Xi(z+i omega)|.
Assume Xi(rho)=0 with Im rho=b>0.  For each 0<omega<min(b,1/2), let z=rho-i omega.  Then z in C_+ and the inequality gives |Xi(rho-2i omega)|<=0.
Thus Xi vanishes on the vertical continuum {rho-2i omega: 0<omega<min(b,1/2)}, which has accumulation points in C.  A nonzero entire function cannot do this.
Therefore Xi has no upper-half-plane zeros.  Since Xi is real entire, conjugation excludes lower-half-plane zeros.  Hence all Xi zeros are real.
caution: This ledger closes the endpoint implication conditional on the imported KLM/Weyl and augmented closed-cone bridge certificates.  It is not an external peer-review validation of those hard inputs.
nextProofTarget: Audit every imported theorem for publication-grade rigor and normalization consistency.
